mapper.select: select * from xms_task where type=#{map.type} and date=#{map.date} limit 1
mapper.delete: delete from xms_task where type=#{map.type} and date=#{map.date}
mapper.select: SELECT grade,COUNT(DISTINCT(user_id)) num FROM xms_user_grade WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user_info WHERE invite_user_code = #{inviteUserCode}) GROUP BY grade ORDER BY grade DESC
select count(user_id) num,task_level grade from t_user_info where active_flag = 1 and invite_user_code = #{inviteUserCode} GROUP BY task_level
SELECT IFNULL( (select max(performance + total_performance) from t_user_info t2 where active_flag = 1 and t2.invite_user_code = #{inviteUserCode}) , 0) as MaxPerformance FROM dual
select count(user_id) from t_user_info where active_flag = 1 and invite_user_code = #{code} and performance > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xms_level_error_log( user_id,biz_type, create_time) VALUES (#{map.userId}, #{map.bizType},#{map.createTime});
